query:
INSERT INTO complementItems (groupId, name, price, isActive, sortOrder) 
SELECT cg.id, 'Bacon Extra', '4.00', 1, 1 FROM complementGroups cg 
INNER JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 AND p.name = 'X-TUDO' AND cg.name = 'Adicionais'
UNION ALL
SELECT cg.id, 'Queijo Cheddar', '3.00', 1, 2 FROM complementGroups cg 
INNER JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 AND p.name = 'X-TUDO' AND cg.name = 'Adicionais'
UNION ALL
SELECT cg.id, 'Ovo Extra', '2.50', 1, 3 FROM complementGroups cg 
INNER JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 AND p.name = 'X-TUDO' AND cg.name = 'Adicionais'
UNION ALL
SELECT cg.id, 'Hambúrguer Extra', '8.00', 1, 4 FROM complementGroups cg 
INNER JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 AND p.name = 'X-TUDO' AND cg.name = 'Adicionais'
UNION ALL
SELECT cg.id, 'Cebola Caramelizada', '3.50', 1, 5 FROM complementGroups cg 
INNER JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 AND p.name = 'X-TUDO' AND cg.name = 'Adicionais';
